introSection: Baby Wildcat was a wooden kiddie roller coaster previously located at Idora Park in Youngstown, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride closed along with the park in 1984. It was standing but not operating until its demolition in 1998.

fullText:
Baby Wildcat was a wooden kiddie roller coaster previously located at Idora Park in Youngstown, Ohio, USA.

The ride closed along with the park in 1984. It was standing but not operating until its demolition in 1998.



White track and supports.
